task_completion.description: Verify the user's Last Name and Email have been updated.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the user profile details for Rachel, the Last Name should be 'Silver' (displaying as Rachel Silver) and the Email field should show 'r.silver@buildingtech.com'.

task_completion.description: Verify the user's Group has been changed to IT Department.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the user's profile, under the Groups or Memberships section, 'IT Department' should be listed. The old group 'Employees' should ideally be removed.

task_completion.description: Verify the old RFID card has been revoked.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the user's Access/Credentials section, the old RFID card number '0004521882' must no longer be present or must be explicitly marked as revoked/deleted.

task_completion.description: Verify the new RFID card has been issued.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the user's Access/Credentials section, the new RFID card number '0004529999' should be visible and assigned to the user.

task_completion.description: Verify the new PIN code has been assigned.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the user's Access/Credentials section, a PIN code should be shown as set (this may appear as '8426', a masked string of asterisks, or a status indicating a PIN is active).

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the web GUI to make changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the 2N Access Commander web interface in a browser, not terminal windows executing curl commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual 2N Access Commander application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar should show 'https://localhost:9443' and the interface should match the standard 2N Access Commander layout.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the results.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no browser developer tools (Inspect Element) open in the screenshots used to fake the text on the screen.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target User: Rachel Goldstein. Required Updates -> New Last Name: Silver; New Email: r.silver@buildingtech.com; New Group: IT Department (Old Group: Employees); Old RFID Card to revoke: 0004521882; New RFID Card to issue: 0004529999; New PIN code: 8426.
